'''thachuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wudhu|wudhu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wudhu|wudhu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thachuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæchiwith|thæchiwith]] || [[word:thæchiwij|thæchiwij]] || [[word:thæchiwish|thæchiwish]] || [[word:thæchiwi|thæchiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachuchuwuth|thachuchuwuth]] || [[word:thachuchuwuj|thachuchuwuj]] || [[word:thachuchuwush|thachuchuwush]] || [[word:thachuchuwu|thachuchuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachuwuth|thachuwuth]] || [[word:thachuwuj|thachuwuj]] || [[word:thachuwush|thachuwush]] || [[word:thachuwu|thachuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachufwuth|thachufwuth]] || [[word:thachufwuj|thachufwuj]] || [[word:thachufwush|thachufwush]] || [[word:thachufwuf|thachufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thachuwuthu|thachuwuthu]] || [[word:thachuwuju|thachuwuju]] || [[word:thachuwushu|thachuwushu]] || [[word:thachuwuku|thachuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thachuwuth|thachuwuth]] || [[word:thachuwuj|thachuwuj]] || [[word:thachuwush|thachuwush]] || [[word:thachuwu|thachuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thachuwuthul|thachuwuthul]] || [[word:thachuwujul|thachuwujul]] || [[word:thachuwushul|thachuwushul]] || [[word:thachuwukul|thachuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thachuwuthuthu|thachuwuthuthu]] || [[word:thachuwujuju|thachuwujuju]] || [[word:thachuwushushu|thachuwushushu]] || [[word:thachuwuku|thachuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thachuwuthun|thachuwuthun]] || [[word:thachuwujun|thachuwujun]] || [[word:thachuwushun|thachuwushun]] || [[word:thachuwukun|thachuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thachuwuthuoro|thachuwuthuoro]] || [[word:thachuwujuoro|thachuwujuoro]] || [[word:thachuwushuoro|thachuwushuoro]] || [[word:thachuwukuoro|thachuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
